title: Assess an existing MaxDiff design
summary: Computes all balance and coverage metrics for a previously generated or externally constructed MaxDiff design.

arguments.name: design_path
arguments.description: Path to the wide-format design CSV. Must have columns Version, Task followed by one column per item slot (Item1, Item2, ...) containing 1-based item indices.

arguments.name: run_dir
arguments.description: Workspace directory where assessment artifacts will be written.

arguments.name: run_name
arguments.description: Run identifier; output files are written to {run_dir}/ocinfo/{run_name}_design/.

value: Produces a unified assessment with item-exposure balance, pair-coverage, within-version and total SSE metrics for any MaxDiff design, regardless of the objective used to generate it.
notes: The spec (n_items, items_per_task, tasks_per_version, versions) is inferred from the CSV header and data.
Metrics include per-version and total exposure counts, pair co-occurrence counts, SSE for item and pair balance within versions, and SSE for total item and pair balance across all versions.
pair_counts_nonzero reports how many of the possible item pairs appear at least once.

see_also.description: Generate the MaxDiff design that assess-design scores.

artifacts.title: Design balance overview
artifacts.description: Item-exposure balance, pair-coverage, and SSE metrics. Use these to verify design quality before fielding, or to compare against an alternative design.
